agents.idle_prompt: Repository heartbeat: the repo looks idle. Review AGENTS.md, current repo status, and your role brief. Pick the next safe primary-agent task, execute it carefully, verify it, and explain what changed or what blocker prevented changes.

Repository heartbeat: the repo looks idle. Review AGENTS.md, current repo status, and your role brief. Pick the next safe secondary-agent task, execute it carefully, verify it, and explain what changed or what blocker prevented changes.
